title: ENTERPILOT/GoModel
summary: AI gateway written in Go. Lightweight unified OpenAI-compatible API for OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Groq, xAI & Ollama. LiteLLM alternative with observability, guardrails, streaming, costs and usage tracking.

title: JohnField07/AI-Bastion
summary: Protect autonomous AI agents on Linux with AI-Bastion’s 8-layer security system to prevent attacks, data theft, and supply chain risks.

title: cutrist/springboot-gemini-integration
summary: Integrate Google Gemini text and image chat using Spring Boot with clean architecture, Thymeleaf UI, and Ollama Cloud model support.

title: cdarnell/arail
summary: Local-first AI research lab blueprint — clone, pick a tier (Minimalist / Maximus), and run experiments. Ships ai-eng (3B Opus-4.7-derived) by default. Airgapped by default, cloud-capable by choice.

title: wlsdks/muse-agent
summary: Building a personal AI that learns how you live and work, then gets better at knowing when and how to help. Local-first, any model.

title: FIRE-hub911/citation-assistant
summary: Enable accurate academic citation by searching, evaluating, and generating BibTeX entries with quality metrics using Semantic Scholar data.

title: pdbethke/corralai
summary: One directive → a herd of AI agents that plan, build, verify, and re-plan across any model (local 7B to frontier) — human-gated, jail→repo, with shared memory + skills. Every mission recorded and replayable.

title: goitno/deepworm
summary: Extract, analyze, and synthesize web data into detailed reports using deep learning without paid APIs or complex setup.

title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

title: minouza/MathCrew
summary: Provide adaptive math tutoring for grades 1–6 using AI agents that generate problems, analyze errors, and guide student practice.

title: aashima/cognithor
summary: Build and run autonomous AI agents locally for experimentation and personal automation with secure, multi-channel support and layered cognitive memory.

title: EdetSimon/Nova_AI_Studio
summary: AI-powered business intelligence assistant built with Python, Ollama, and Pandas that analyzes CSV datasets and generates executive business reports.

title: guillermovzq/alchemical-agent-ecosystem
summary: Build and manage local-first AI agents with real-time orchestration, dashboards, and scalable integrations using Redis, ChromaDB, and FastAPI.

title: moheladwy/ExpertBridge
summary: A professional networking platform that connects users with experts and technicians. Features include personalized feeds, job hiring, chat, AI-powered content moderation, and a dual-role reputation system. (normalization)

title: AlexanderFarhan/omniclaw
summary: Build and manage intelligent hybrid AI agent systems that combine multiple models to enhance automation and decision-making.

title: gfargo/coco
summary: AI-powered Git Assistant for CLI

title: K3Tamaa/Vector-Forge
summary: Deliver intelligent document understanding and explainable semantic search with a modular, locally hosted Retrieval-Augmented Generation system.

title: malindo77/smartchannels
summary: Deliver a secure, multi-channel AI assistant platform with persistent memory and local-first intelligence for seamless messaging integration.

title: jpoindexter/Vanta
summary: A local AI agent with a Rust safety kernel that gates every action — goal-aware, provider-agnostic, self-hosted. MIT.

title: roshdyreda117171/MedTrace
summary: Analyze biomedical literature with MedTrace to detect contradictions and synthesize evidence using retrieval-augmented generation across PubMed data.
